creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
..results in a failed attempt to patch idea.c for USA residents. The real
problem is not that the patch fails and moves on, but that it prompts the
user for a file to patch, having not found idea.c.

Fix: apply the patch

diff gnupg-rsa/Makefile gnupg-rsa/Makefile
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/security/gnugg-rsa &&
	make USA_RESIDENT=YES
